title: Implement User Addition from Purchase via Salesforce Zap
description:
Implement a Salesforce/Zapier integration that automatically creates a user in DataTools Pro when a new customer completes a purchase. This leverages the existing add-user function to provision accounts from the payment/purchase flow.

This depends on MBT-454 (payment integration) being in place first.
acceptance_criteria: New users are automatically provisioned when a purchase is completed
The existing add-user function is invoked by the Zapier automation
User creation follows the same flow as other onboarding paths
implementation_notes: Depends on MBT-454 payment integration. Will use the existing add-user API endpoint triggered by a Zapier automation from the Salesforce purchase event.
